summary: First live-market run with a flat $10,000 bankroll. Reviewed the tape (SPY -0.3%, TSLA -3% and GOOGL +1.7% both ahead of Wed 7/22 earnings, energy firm) and macro (Fear sentiment, unconfirmed 10-day Iran ceasefire proposal). Ran every candidate (long GOOGL, short TSLA, long energy, relief-rally SPY) through the pre-trade checklist and all failed on edge/asymmetry — this is a fearful, earnings-binary-heavy week with no articulable mispricing. Held 100% cash to dodge activity bias and keep dry powder for post-earnings setups.
